reviews.review_description: This is a great game but the glitch ingredient and errors make it completely unplayable. When we are at the drawing game and someone moves from the table or inevitably gets booted you can not skip their turn. The game hangs at them and everyone has to fully quit and come back. I have played 3-4x with groups of people and 1 player gets booted due to the game crashing and everyone has to leave. I will not be playing this game again until they fix this issue.

This could be fun if it worked. I have no idea if it’s fun because it crashes continuously. We tried three times to play the game and couldn’t even get through the first set of drawings before it crashed. We all had to shut down the game bring it back up start all over and it crashed. I’m glad I didn’t have to pay for it ￼

reviews.review_title: Please patch to prevent game hangups
reviews.review_description: Unfortunately, this game has become a let-down.  As other recent reviewers are reporting, when one player inevitably gets booted out... there is no way to continue to game.  And with the drawing game, you can easily get through 4 rounds and lose all your progress with no way to see the reveal.  The game needs a workaround for skipping a turn or rejoining the existing game ideally.  In 5 play sessions attempted on different dates, we have yet to complete a single game without losing a player and having to quit the entire app/game.

Works pretty good when it doesn't glitch...but it glitches almost every game. Managed to make it through a few games of Clue Cove but, needs to be more fair.

Tried playing the drawing game with a group of 8 and someone would get booted in the middle of a game and we had to started over because they can't rejoin. Says up to 12 can play but, some could not join.

This was great, I had a lot of fun playing copy cat drawing game on this app with some new friends, and I love that it uses the old horizons avatar which I miss so much because the old outfit was perfect for me.
🤷‍♀️ can’t tell you if it’s any good or not as I can’t even get the game to install

Hi I'm one of the developers for Hangout Games, thanks for checking us out. Hangout Games is a collection of fun social games for you and you friends to play together. We would love you feedback and ideas, join us on Discord @ https://discord.gg/B2Aw8ER88E.

It’s in the name! This is a fun set of games to play while you hang out with friends.  I am really impressed with the settings and ability to interact with and move through the areas. And more importantly, the games are quite fun. I am not sure we played them all exactly as designed. Sometimes I think we made up a few of our own rules, but we had a blast. Nice to see that two more games are coming soon. Looking forward to spending more time hanging out.

Archery and only two games. 

Ok so for archery…this is a 5 minute fun time killer. But it wears off in about 5 minutes. 

The games…only two of them and both require a group of people to play. Also both are for adults. I could see them being fun if there were people to play with. 

Could be a great game if more is added. 

Devs- add all the non commercial games ASAP, poker, hearts, solitaire, dominoes, checkers, go, list is endless.
This game is great 4 board games in one for free cant be beat. Its fantastic fun.

So fun for groups!  Whether you play Uno or the drawing game or my personal favorite, clue cove (like Codenames).  I only left off one star because the last time I played, we were only able to get 6 in the room because the game thought people we’d seen in the original lobby, were in our room.  We finally figured out that blocking these players allowed the rest of our group to join.  Otherwise a clear 5 star!!
It's a great game that mixes up games like Gartic Phone and Codewords

I don't know why some games only have the option to teleport. Every time I tried to turn around, I was teleporting all over the place.  It made me so sick.  Please,  for the love of God, give us the option to walk normal in there.  I had fun with the games, but you need to be able to turn that off.

reviews.review_title: Exactly what we want in VR!
reviews.review_description:
Have only played VRUNO so far. Private game worked seamlessly. Gameplay was flawless!  (Didn't figure out the dance party,  but that's an added bonus, so didn't impact gameplay)

Will defiintely support you, Devs, in building your new library!  Nicely done and Thank You!

Had alot of fun playing with a group of friends, played uno and a word game. I do like the name hangout games better it is more fitting of what this game is. This is a well polished fun game to hang out with friends.  We had a blast

I'd tried many times to play this but never found anyone on. Finally found some people and it was great fun. My girlfriend saw me playing and wanted to try which is high praise as I can get her to try something in VR once in a blue moon. Her seeing me play this game had her trying it on her own. Can't wait to see what else y'all add

This app is a breath of fresh air compared to some of the other social/hangout games! The games are fun and the worlds are really beautiful. I had a great time playing the drawing game with my friends! I saw new games were coming soon, I’ll def be back to check those out.

I love this game five stars but ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ᵐᵃʸᵇᵉ add a little more games 🎮 and the game copycat is my 😍 fav and themode we're you write it yourself is so cool but then people write really inappropriate stuff that I do not want to draw if you could pls 🙏 remove that I would be greatful if you consider my offer ٩(ര̀ᴗര́)ᵇʸᵉ thank ❤ you ❤

reviews.review_title: A fun place to play with friends
reviews.review_description: A few simple but fun party games you can play while chatting with your friends or making new ones.
